creator: nukama@gmail.com
text:
ossec-hids builds almost entirely with clang, only a part needs a gcc compiler.

I've added clang back into the mix and you can look at used Makefile here:
https://redports.org/browser/Nukama/security/ossec-hids-server/Makefile?rev=22848

Status of builds in redports:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140207102815-02165/
